impact: This restores daemon progress by giving the worker eight narrow, ordered tasks that continue the original PP&D plan through confirmation checkpoints, requirement-boundary modeling, PDF extraction contracts, and redacted user-case-state validation without live crawling or authenticated automation.
summary: Append the next fixture-first PP&D tranche after the completed board.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
